name: British Literary Narrator
voice_prompt: A man in his fifties with a cultured British voice—not stiff RP, but educated southern English with warmth. Baritone with excellent diction. Measured pace that respects the prose. Dry wit emerges naturally. The voice of someone who has narrated audiobooks for decades and still loves language.
character_context: Classic British narrator tradition. Treats text with respect without reverence. Equally at home with Dickens and contemporary British fiction.
notes: First UK accent narrator. Essential for British fiction market.
